title: Michael Marten
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Michael}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Michael Marten''' was credited as a contributing editor for issues [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 2|2]] through [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 18|18]] of the ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly]]'' magazine, and may have held the same position for the [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 1|first issue]] as well.

He also contributed articles to the following issues, credited as '''Dr. M. F. Marten''':

*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 2]]'': "[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]: Desert Planet at the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Galactic Frontier]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 3]]'': "Robotics: From [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]] to Quasars"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 5]]'': "The [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] File"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 6]]'': "An [[Alien/Legends|Alien]] Universe"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 8]]'': "The Ins and Outs of Space Travel"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 9]]'': "The Brain of the '[[Droid/Legends|Droid]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 10]]'': "What It Takes to be a Space Pilot"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 11]]'': "[[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]]!"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 12]]'': "The [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] Aliens"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 13]]'': "[[P. S. Ellenshaw]] and the Magic of Matte"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 14]]'': "War in Space—Fact and Fiction"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 15]]'': "Bleep-Bleep!—[[Wikipedia:SETI|The Search For Extra-Terrestrial Intelligence]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 16]]'': "Activate Memory Circuits—It's the ''[[Star Wars]]'' Quiz"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 17]]'': "Near Encounter With an Alien Body"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 18]]'': "[[Joe Johnston]]—The Sketch Book Wizard"
